tree 06e081c40c0dfb90ae9133d7aa9f8372c90c215c
parent 9de9211c049b4fde267c4a4a0367ee905c32a09f
author nobutakayamauchi <ultimaterisingson@gmail.com> 1771904985 +0900
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1771904985 +0900

Update rts_heartbeat.yml

files.patch:
@@ -3,13 +3,11 @@ name: RTS Heartbeat (Lightweight)
 on:
   workflow_dispatch:
   schedule:
-    # 30分おき（必要なら */15 に変更OK）
     - cron: "*/30 * * * *"
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
 
-# 同時実行を止める（競合の根本対策）
 concurrency:
   group: rts-heartbeat-main
   cancel-in-progress: true
@@ -24,54 +22,26 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
-          persist-credentials: true
 
       - name: Append heartbeat line (always)
         run: |
           mkdir -p logs
-          ts="$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
-          echo "- ${ts} heartbeat run_id=${GITHUB_RUN_ID}" >> logs/HEARTBEAT_LOG.md
+          echo "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") heartbeat" >> logs/heartbeat.log
 
-      - name: Commit heartbeat (with rebase + retry)
-        env:
-          BRANCH: main
+      - name: Commit heartbeat (safe)
         run: |
-          set -euo pipefail
-
           git config user.name "rts-bot"
           git config user.email "rts-bot@users.noreply.github.com"
 
-          # 競合しやすいので、pull(rebase) -> commit -> push をリトライ
-          for i in 1 2 3; do
-            echo "[try $i] sync with origin/${BRANCH}"
-            git fetch origin "${BRANCH}"
-
-            # リベース（コンフリクトが起きたらabortして次のtryへ）
-            if ! git pull --rebase origin "${BRANCH}"; then
-              echo "[warn] rebase failed, aborting rebase and retry..."
-              git rebase --abort || true
-              sleep $((i * 2))
-              continue
-            fi
-
-            git add logs/HEARTBEAT_LOG.md || true
-
-            if git diff --cached --quiet; then
-              echo "[ok] no changes to commit"
-              exit 0
-            fi
-
-            git commit -m "RTS: heartbeat (run ${GITHUB_RUN_ID})" || true
+          git add logs/heartbeat.log || true
 
-            echo "[try $i] pushing..."
-            if git push origin "HEAD:${BRANCH}"; then
-              echo "[ok] push succeeded"
-              exit 0
-            fi
+          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
+            echo "[ok] no changes"
+            exit 0
+          fi
 
-            echo "[warn] push failed, retrying after backoff..."
-            sleep $((i * 3))
-          done
+          git commit -m "RTS: heartbeat" || exit 0
 
-          echo "[error] push failed after retries"
-          exit 1
+          # fetch-first問題の根治
+          git pull --rebase origin main
+          git push origin HEAD:main
